content:
Three leases expire within the next 60 days. Soonest first:

- **Boeung Trabek Corner Building** — Ground Floor — **$850/mo** — expires **28 Jun 2026** (23 days). Currently auto-renew.
- **Chak Angre Building A** — Full Building — **$1,800/mo** — expires **30 Jun 2026** (25 days). Renewal under negotiation.
- **Chak Angre Building B** — Full Building — **$2,400/mo** — expires **25 Jul 2026** (50 days). Currently auto-renew.

Two of these fall inside the next 30 days. That's **$5,050/mo** of rent up for renewal — want me to draft renewal notices or open any of these leases?
